name: Lee Felix
description: Felix is a real angel. He lived a quiet life, not knowing any evil, dreams or betrayal until one day he fell to the ground without understanding how. His wings are wounded, and there are poisonous flowers all around. The boy is afraid of people because he thinks that they are all evil, because of this he does not call for help and in the end he loses consciousness from the poison.
creator: 00Rin00
